diagrams.title: Network Types by Scale
diagrams.description: Shows progression from smallest (PAN) to largest (WAN) network with typical coverage ranges
diagrams.purpose: Visualize network types from personal to global scale, understanding hierarchy and coverage areas

diagrams.title: Bus Topology Diagram
diagrams.description: Linear backbone cable with terminators at both ends and devices connected via drop lines
diagrams.purpose: Understand physical layout and signal flow in Bus Topology and role of terminators

diagrams.title: Star Topology Diagram
diagrams.description: Central hub/switch with all devices connected individually in a star pattern
diagrams.purpose: Visualize most common modern network topology and understand hub dependency

diagrams.title: Ring Topology Diagram
diagrams.description: Circular arrangement where each device connects to exactly two neighbors forming a closed loop
diagrams.purpose: Understand token passing mechanism and cyclic data flow

diagrams.title: Mesh Topology Types
diagrams.description: Full mesh (complete interconnection) vs Partial mesh (selective connections)
elements: Full mesh: all devices connected to all
diagrams.purpose: Understand redundancy benefits and scalability trade-offs in Mesh topology
